name: menu-section
visual_summary: A component for dividing content into distinct sections within a menu. It typically consists of a title and optional links or actions. Use this when structuring hierarchical menus or presenting categories of related options.
interaction_tags: e.g. no hover or click effects
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: menu-section
Description: A component for dividing content into distinct sections within a menu. It typically consists of a title and optional links or actions. Use this when structuring hierarchical menus or presenting categories of related options.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. no hover or click effects
Tags: menu, section, container

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
